# ICON Community Interface

Welcome! We’re excited you’re here and ready to build plugins with this library.
If you find the project useful, please star the [GitLab repository](https://gitlab.dkrz.de/icon-comin/comin). That one click boosts visibility in the community, helps others discover the library, and also makes the ComIn developers aware of all the plugins that are created with their library.

---

Contact:  <comin@icon-model.org>

Contributors are listed in the AUTHORS.md file.
For further information, see the [Documentation](doc/icon_comin_doc.md) which includes also a user guide and description of several example plugins.
